content_preview: HIGHLIGHTS
evidence: ["author byline on page 1, assigned as authors: HIGHLIGHTS"]

content_preview: • Microfibre patterning onto an anatomical relevant structure and clinically relevant materials is demonstrated.
• Accurate microfibre patterning is demonstrated on both electrically conductive and non-conductive materials.
• Fabrication of a microfibre-reinforced, cell-laden hydrogel that resurfaces a human biological joint replica is shown
